tool.name: jwt_analyzer
tool.description: Analyze and test JWT tokens for security vulnerabilities including algorithm confusion, none algorithm bypass, and claim validation.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Decode and inspect JWT token structure (header, payload, signature) - Detect security vulnerabilities in JWT implementation - Test for none algorithm bypass attacks - Test for RS256 to HS256 algorithm confusion attacks - Validate token claims (expiration, issuer, audience) - Identify sensitive data exposure in token payloads - Analyze JWT headers for dangerous configurations (jku, x5u, kid injection)

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The JWT analysis action to perform: - decode: Decode and display JWT header, payload, and signature - analyze: Full security analysis with vulnerability detection - test_none_alg: Generate tokens for testing none algorithm bypass - test_alg_confusion: Test for algorithm confusion attacks (RS256->HS256) - validate_claims: Validate token claims against expected values

parameter.name: token
parameter.description: The JWT token to analyze (format: header.payload.signature)

parameter.name: public_key
parameter.description: Public key for algorithm confusion testing. Required for generating HS256 tokens signed with public key in RS256->HS256 attack.

parameter.name: expected_issuer
parameter.description: Expected issuer (iss) claim value for validation.

parameter.name: expected_audience
parameter.description: Expected audience (aud) claim value for validation.

returns.description: Analysis results including: - Decoded header and payload - Security issues and vulnerabilities found - Test payloads for bypass attempts - Claim validation results - Risk assessment (high/medium/low)

tool.examples:
# Decode a JWT token
decode eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIiwibmFtZSI6IkpvaG4gRG9lIiwiaWF0IjoxNTE2MjM5MDIyfQ.SflKxwRJSMeKKF2QT4fwpMeJf36POk6yJV_adQssw5c
# Perform full security analysis
analyze eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...
# Test for none algorithm bypass
test_none_alg eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...
# Test for algorithm confusion
test_alg_confusion eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9... -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----...
# Validate claims
validate_claims eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9... https://auth.example.com https://api.example.com
